headline: What Boards and Ethics Offices Should Put on a Tip Line Before Launch
subtext: A board committee or ethics office can do a lot of internal preparation before launching a public reporting channel: decide who monitors it, review policy language, and agree on escalation paths. But the first practical test often happens earlier. A whistlebl…
